loadingHint: Chef’s Studio will be available in a moment.

freePlan.title: Free plan
freePlan.description: No AI. Upload a photo and use “Add without enhancement”. On the digital menu: Powered by Chefvision.pl.

trial.noTokensDescription: Trial runs for 14 days — own photos without AI. Premium restores generation.
trial.activeDescription: Full Premium quality — no watermark, 50 tokens. After trial: Premium or free plan.

errors.noTrialTokens: No trial tokens left. You can add your own photos or upgrade to Premium.
errors.shareUnavailable: File sharing is not available in this browser. Use “Download”, then add the file in your chosen app.

upload.readyFreeHint: Use “Add without enhancement” or upgrade to Premium.
upload.readyNextStep: Go to step 2 — choose a style.
upload.dropzoneTitle: Drag a photo here or click to choose
upload.dropzoneHint: JPG / PNG / WEBP · up to 1 MB (we compress automatically)

quickAdd.disabledTitle: Upload a photo in step 1 first

preview.title: Preview ({{count}}/{{max}})
preview.emptyTitle: Your enhanced photo will appear here
preview.emptyHint: Each “Enhance photo” click adds a variant (max {{max}}).
